title: RalphIterationResult
description: Structured result written by each subagent iteration to .pi/ralph-result.json

done.description: Whether the overall task is now complete (completion promise is true)

summary.description: Concise summary of what was accomplished this iteration (1-3 sentences)

completed_tasks.description: Tasks from IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md that were completed this iteration

failed_tasks.description: Tasks that were attempted but could not be completed

plan_updated.description: Whether IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md was updated with progress/new discoveries

commits.description: Git commit hashes produced this iteration

blockers.description: Any blockers discovered that prevent task completion

learnings.description: New operational learnings (would be added to AGENTS.md)
